title: Rich Light Midnight-Craving Egyptian Spaghetti Stir-fry
description: A light and rich spaghetti dish that satisfies a midnight craving, perfect for those following a fodmap-friendly diet.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup of olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use for stir-frying and drizzling on top

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: Squeezed fresh, optional but recommended for brightness

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup of grated Parmesan cheese
ingredients.notes: Optional, can be substituted with a non-dairy alternative if needed

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Dress the cooked spaghetti with lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Toss gently to coat evenly.
Sprinkle the ground cinnamon on top of the spaghetti and toss again to combine.
Drizzle a bit more olive oil over the spaghetti and mix well.
Garnish with grated Parmesan cheese if using, before serving.
